## Purpose

4-phase lifecycle (setup/execute/findings/amend) shared by all skills. Lightweight mode merges execute+findings, makes amend optional. Full mode runs all 4 phases explicitly.


## Commands

- scout
- draft
- review
- flow
- trace
- prove
- listen
- program
- topic
